revision_priority: Rewrite Professional Summary into exactly 3 labeled sentences and replace the generic third label with a higher-signal systems-judgment header.
Add one explicit end-to-end ownership clause to the strongest DiDi or TikTok bullet so the React + REST + SQL full-stack bridge reads more directly.
revision_instructions: Make two surgical edits only. First, replace `## Professional Summary` with exactly 3 full sentences, each starting with a bold label; keep the current technical claims, but remove bullet formatting and change the third label from a generic collaboration-style phrase to a senior-signal label such as `Pattern Recognition`, `Systems Judgment`, or `Decision-Making`. Second, strengthen the transition story by expanding one existing DiDi or TikTok bullet with a single clause that shows end-to-end ownership across the frontend, REST service, and SQL-backed persistence path; do not delete any JD must-have technology and do not rewrite the experience skeleton.
